hero.title: Vue SSR Starter Kit
hero.subtitle: Production-ready boilerplate for Vue 3, Express & MongoDB
hero.description: A complete foundation for building modern web applications with Server-Side Rendering, authentication, internationalization, and an admin panel — all included.

ssr.title: Server-Side Rendering
ssr.description: Full SSR with Vite and Vue 3. Fast initial load, SEO-optimized pages, and seamless client hydration.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Email security code flow, sessions, bcryptjs password hashing, and rate limiting on all auth endpoints.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Built-in EN/FR support with Vue i18n. Easily extend to more languages by adding JSON files.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.description: User management with role-based access control (user/admin), activity logs, and a protected admin interface.

ui.title: Vuetify UI
ui.description: Material Design 3 components with light/dark theme support and a SCSS design system.

security.title: Security
security.description: Helmet headers, CORS whitelist, HTTP-only session cookies, rate limiting, IP tracking, and input validation.

account.title: Account Management
account.description: Users can update their profile, change their email address with verification, and change their password.

logging.title: Event Logging
logging.description: All auth and admin actions are logged to MongoDB. Admins can browse, filter, and delete activity logs.

ipSecurity.title: IP Security
ipSecurity.description: Login IPs are tracked per user. Admins can block users and optionally block their associated IP addresses.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: Free and open source. Fork it, customize it, build on it.

index.title: Vue SSR Starter Kit
index.description: Production-ready boilerplate for Vue 3, Express and MongoDB with SSR, authentication, i18n, and admin panel.

error.tooManyRequests: Too many requests, please try again later

auth.sameEmail: New email must be different from your current email
auth.resendTooSoon: Please wait before requesting a new code

admin.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account

deleteConfirm.title: Delete user
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

blockConfirm.title: Block user
blockConfirm.message: This will prevent the user from signing in.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete log
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this log entry?

bulkDeleteConfirm.title: Delete logs
bulkDeleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete {count} log entries? This action cannot be undone.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for this email address, a password reset code has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email, the reset code you received, and your new password.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully. You can now sign in.

email.title: Email Address
email.codeSent: A verification code has been sent to {email}. Enter it below to confirm the change.
